excerpt: if multiple gods existed, the universe itself would collapse through their mutual discord
source_location_hint: theological argument for divine unity based on cosmic order

excerpt: No prophet has been tormented as I have been tormented
true monotheism requires stripping away all associations with creaturely limitation
I have been commanded to fight the polytheists
There is no compulsion in religion
source_location_hint: distinction between external Islamic law and internal faith

excerpt: The Messenger of Allah opened for me a thousand doors of wisdom, and from each door a thousand more doors opened before me
source_location_hint: infinite wisdom transmissible from the Imam

excerpt: Whomever I am master of, Ali is his master
source_location_hint: Ghadīr Khumm hadith and Ali's spiritual authority

excerpt: Whoever says Lā ilāha illā'llāh with sincere intention enters Paradise, and his sincerity is knowledge of its bounds and fulfillment of its rights
source_work: Ismaili tradition and Imam Ali teachings
source_location_hint: definition of ikhlas and knowledge of hudud

excerpt: This world is the womb of the Hereafter

source_work: transmitted tradition of Imam Jaʿfar al-Ṣādiq
source_location_hint: foundational principle integrating faith and practice
